title: cheilanthes greggii
intro: Cheilanthes greggii, also known as Gregg's lip fern or fern plant, is a type of evergreen fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its ability to treat colds, fever, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cheilanthes greggii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. Cheilanthes greggii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in capsule or powder form for further medicinal use.
